info.title: Stableyard SDK API
info.description:
SDK-prefixed endpoints (mounted under `/sdk/v1`) that wrap Stableyard services. All responses use the middleware envelope `{ success, data|error, requestId }`.

Authentication & Headers:
- Provide your SDK key via Swagger's built-in Authorize button (maps to `x-sdk-key`).
- Include an `Origin` header that matches an entry in `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS`. Although not modeled as a parameter in this spec, the middleware enforces it at runtime.

SdkApiKey.name: x-sdk-key
SdkApiKey.description: Value must match one of the comma-separated keys defined in `SDK_API_KEYS`.

addresses.description: Array of addresses. At least one address is required.
Array of user addresses with chainType

userNameExists.description: True if username exists, false if available

addresses.description: User addresses array. Includes all addresses with their chainType.

UpdateKycRequest.description: Provide exactly one of userId, username, or paymentAddress alongside the Sumsub token.

txData.description: Safe execTransaction payload object (must include to, data, operation, etc.)

destinationUserId.description: Destination user ID (optional, alternative to destinationPaymentAddress or destinationWalletAddress)

destinationPaymentAddress.description: Destination payment address in format username@resolverName (optional)

destinationChainID.description: Destination chain ID (optional, will use user preferences if not provided)

destinationToken.description: Destination token symbol (optional, will use user preferences if not provided)

userId.description: User ID whose KYC data should be sent

partnerName.description: Name of the partner to send KYC data to (e.g., 'gaian')

isTracked.description: True if the address is tracked, false otherwise

chainType.description: Optional chainType filter when using address

GetBalanceRequest.description: Provide exactly one of userId, paymentAddress, or address

SettleTransactionRequest.description: Payment data object. Can be the full payload with authorization, signature, domain, types, or a simplified object with payment details.

payload.description: Full EIP-712 payload (optional, if provided must include authorization, signature, domain, types)

from.description: Payment address of the sender (username@resolverName or wallet address)

to.description: Payment address or wallet address of the recipient

value.description: Amount in smallest unit (e.g., for USDC with 6 decimals, 1000000 = 1 USDC)

validAfter.description: Unix timestamp after which the authorization is valid

validBefore.description: Unix timestamp before which the authorization is valid

destinationChainID.description: Destination chain ID (optional, will use user preferences if not provided)

destinationToken.description: Destination token symbol (optional, will use user preferences if not provided)

SettleTransactionResponse.description: Success message indicating transaction was sent successfully (processing in background)

400.description: Validation error or username already exists

post.summary: Provision Safe vault for a user

200.description: Vault status returned. If proxy module is not deployed, txData is included. If deployed, proxyModuleAddress is included.

message.description: Status message indicating proxy module needs deployment

txData.description: Transaction data for deploying proxy module

400.description: Vaults are not deployed or missing userId

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Match against any address in the user's addresses array.

404.description: No user associated with that address

post.summary: Mark KYC complete and store Sumsub token
Get Polygon USDC balance in vault
post.description: Get balance for a user. Provide exactly one of userId, paymentAddress, or address (with optional chainType).

404.description: User not found or vault address not set

post.summary: Deploy role module via Safe transaction

txData.description: Safe execTransaction payload object (to, data, operation, ...) or JSON string

400.description: Validation error or Safe execution reverted

404.description: Safe address not found for user

get.summary: Get paginated transaction history for a user
get.description: Get transaction history. userId can be provided in query or body.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID (can also be provided in request body)

post.summary: Verify if a transfer has been completed to a deposit address
post.description: Checks if a supported token has been transferred to the specified deposit address. Returns true if a balance is found and the transaction is processed, false otherwise.

chainId.description: The chain ID where the deposit address exists

depositAddress.description: The deposit address to check for transfers

isTransferDone.description: True if a transfer was found and processed, false otherwise

400.description: Invalid payload - chainId (number) and depositAddress (string) are required

post.summary: Create a quote for cross-chain or same-chain transaction
post.description: Generates a quote for transferring tokens between chains or addresses. Uses user's preferred settlement chain and token as source if not specified.

400.description: Invalid payload - userId, partnerId (string), and amount (number) are required

404.description: Partner, user, or config not found

post.summary: Send KYC data to a partner
post.description: Sends KYC applicant data (text and images) to the specified partner for processing.

400.description: Invalid payload - userId and partnerName are required

post.summary: Settle transaction by redeeming USDC from vault and initiating cross-chain settlement
post.description: Settles a transaction by redeeming USDC from the user's vault and initiating cross-chain settlement. The settlement process runs in the background and returns immediately with a success message.

data.description: Success message indicating transaction was sent successfully (processing in background)

400.description: Invalid request - missing required fields or invalid parameters

404.description: User not found or missing required addresses (vault/proxy module)

get.summary: Get KYC link for a user
Get recent transactions for a user
get.description: Get recent transactions list. userId can be provided in query or body.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID (can also be provided in request body)

get.summary: Get balances for an address across all supported chains
get.description: Fetches balances for EVM, Solana, and Movement chains. Returns balances with USD values, filtered by minimum amount and sorted by USD value descending.

parameters.name: userAddress
parameters.description: The address to check balances for

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Minimum USD amount to filter balances (default: 0)

post.summary: Get deposit address and quote from Gasyard API
post.description: Retrieves settlement data from payment address and gets a deposit address quote from Gasyard API for cross-chain transfers.

rawAmount.description: Amount in raw units (smallest token unit)

400.description: Invalid payload - all fields are required

404.description: User not found or invalid payment address

500.description: Internal server error or Gasyard API error
